patches.title: Core Backend Infrastructure
points: Implemented full Supabase backend architecture for the progression system.
Added multi-session progression campaigns with persistent save/load support.
Built lobby system with join, leave, and ready state tracking.
Added real-time activity feed for session events.
Introduced content lock system for packs, promo boxes, and feature cards.
Added pull logging framework for future pack opening systems.
Implemented secure multiplayer permissions with Row Level Security.
Added card database foundation for binder, deck builder, and pack systems.
Frontend now builds a runtime progression state object for gameplay systems.

patches.title: Website Migration + Account System
points: Moved the Progression App from a local tool into the live Gentlemen's Gaming website.
Added Discord login so users must authenticate before accessing the app.
Built the login overlay and logged-in user panel into the main dashboard.
Connected Supabase as the first live database layer for future league data.
Restructured the home layout into a three-column dashboard.

patches.title: Initial App Foundation
points: Built the AIO Progression Series hub and main navigation structure.
Added pages for Phases, Scoreboard, Promotional Boxes, Store, Feature Cards, RNG, Inventory, and Admin.
Separated Promotional Boxes into their own dedicated app flow.
Laid the groundwork for league economy, inventory tracking, and admin systems.
